prompt_text:
### Demographics: 39-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.9 kg; Height 162.1 cm; BMI 21.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.7%; 6 months ago 6.6%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 172mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 183mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.1kg; 9 months ago 55.9kg; 6 months ago 58.8kg; 3 months ago 55.2kg; current 55.9kg), Height (12 months ago 162.1cm; 9 months ago 162.1cm; 6 months ago 162.1cm; 3 months ago 162.1cm; current 162.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 84U/L; 9 months ago 85U/L; 6 months ago 84U/L; 3 months ago 86U/L; current 90U/L), AST (12 months ago 74U/L; 9 months ago 76U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 74U/L; current 72U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 70mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; current 67mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 21mg/g; 9 months ago 20mg/g; 6 months ago 27mg/g; 3 months ago 28mg/g; current 22mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 70mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 35mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 105mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 104mg/dL; current 115mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.49 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
